clientFunction.name: display_image
clientFunction.description: Renders an approved image inline to help the customer identify kit or follow a step. Call whenever a picture helps. Pass the exact approved image URL (verbatim) and short alt text. One image per message.

caption.description: Short plain-language alt text describing what the image shows, e.g. 'Virgin Media wall socket' or 'Connecting the coaxial cable to your Hub 5'.

url.description: The exact approved image URL to display inline, copied verbatim from the approved media library. Never invented or modified.

status.description: Whether the image was rendered on the client. 'OK' on success.
